## 📈 Key Findings

### Tier Breakdown
```
Tier-1:       6 students (37.5%) - 74.73% avg probability
Tier-2:       3 students (18.75%) - 63.78% avg probability
Tier-3:       6 students (37.5%) - 41.93% avg probability
Below Tier-3: 1 student (6.25%) - 22.87% avg probability
```

### Probability Ranges
- **Tier-1**: 70.9% - 78.4% (HIGHEST)
- **Tier-2**: 54.1% - 69.7%
- **Tier-3**: 30.8% - 49.1%
- **Below Tier-3**: 22.9% (LOWEST)

---

## 🎯 What Each Graph Shows

### Graph 1: Tier Distribution (Pie)
- Visual percentage of students in each tier
- Easy to see which tier has most students
- **Finding**: Tier-1 and Tier-3 have equal students (37.5% each)

### Graph 2: Tier Distribution (Bar)
- Exact count of students per tier
- **Finding**: 6 Tier-1, 3 Tier-2, 6 Tier-3, 1 Below Tier-3

### Graph 3: Probability by Tier (Box Plot)
- Shows probability range for each tier
- Median, quartiles, and outliers
- **Finding**: Clear separation between tiers

### Graph 4: CGPA vs Probability (Scatter)
- Relationship between CGPA and placement probability
- Color-coded by tier
- **Finding**: Higher CGPA correlates with higher probability

### Graph 5: Aptitude Distribution (Histogram)
- How aptitude scores vary by tier
- **Finding**: Tier-1 students have higher aptitude

### Graph 6: Communication Skills (Violin Plot)
- Distribution of communication scores
- Shows median and spread
- **Finding**: Tier-1 students have better communication

### Graph 7: Technical Skills (Violin Plot)
- Distribution of technical scores
- **Finding**: Tier-1 students have better technical skills

### Graph 8: Internship Experience (Bar)
- Average internship count by tier
- **Finding**: Tier-1 students have more internships

### Graph 9: Projects Completed (Bar)
- Average projects by tier
- **Finding**: Tier-1 students have more projects

### Correlation Heatmap
- Shows which features are related
- Red = positive correlation
- Blue = negative correlation
- **Finding**: Probability strongly correlates with skills

---

## 💡 Insights from Graphs

### Tier-1 Students (Excellent)
- ✅ Highest probability (70-78%)
- ✅ Best communication skills
- ✅ Best technical skills
- ✅ Most internship experience
- ✅ Most projects completed
- **Action**: Ready for top companies

### Tier-2 Students (Good)
- ⚠️ Good probability (54-70%)
- ⚠️ Moderate skills
- ⚠️ Some internship experience
- ⚠️ Some projects
- **Action**: Prepare for mid-tier companies

### Tier-3 Students (Moderate)
- 🔧 Moderate probability (30-49%)
- 🔧 Lower skills
- 🔧 Limited internship experience
- 🔧 Few projects
- **Action**: Needs skill development

### Below Tier-3 Students (Low)
- ❌ Low probability (22.9%)
- ❌ Weak skills
- ❌ No internship experience
- ❌ No projects
- **Action**: Needs intensive support

---

### For Admin Panel

3. Assign mentors
4. Set targets
